title: SOLEA API
description: SoleaAPI is a utility mod that combines homes, warps, TPA, teams, moderation, and combat-log tools into one configurable package with dynamic prefix support and EN/FR localization.
body:
![SOLEA PIXEL](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/203bb56b855343e81df224309470a0072a01242a.png)


- **Support me by joining my discord**
- **Support me, [Buy Me a Coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/SILWOX)**

![SOLEA CORE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0a39caebce0187e9af3fa689e79bd2ea63e11ff_0.webp)
## Overview

SoleaAPI is a utility mod for NeoForge servers (semi-RP, survival, community hubs). It bundles homes, warps, TPA, teams, moderation tools, combat-log handling, and more—behind a **single customizable chat prefix** and clean **EN/FR** translations. 

![FEATURES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f0dfae69af747e3f1d5b68e07634de15390734c_0.webp)

### Players

- **Homes & teleport** — `/sethome`, `/delhome`, `/home` with **paginated clickable list**; `/spawn`, `/back`, `/rtp` with **cooldown** and cancel on move or combat hits.
- **Warps** — `/warp` with **clickable warp list**; behavior tuned via config / runtime settings.
- **TPA** — `/tpa`, `/tpahere`, `/tpaccept`, `/tpdeny`; **expiry**, rate limits, **click-to-accept/deny**, pending-count feedback.

### Teams

- One team per player: **name**, **color**, **description**.
- Optional **tab-list prefix** via vanilla scoreboard teams when enabled on the team.
- Invite/join/leave and **disband** flows aligned with server gamerules.

### Moderation & staff

- **Freeze / mute** — `/freeze`, `/unfreeze`, `/mute`, timed mute, `/unmute`.
- **Warns** — `/warn`, `/unwarn`, `/warns`, `/clearwarns` with stored history and readable listings.
- **Inspection** — `/invsee`, `/echestsee` (inventory / ender chest GUIs).
- **Admin Claim** /ac claim SafeZone / WarZone , /ac create group

### UX

- **Dynamic prefix** — change once with `/solea prefix`; Solea messages use it everywhere (no hardcoded `[SOLEA API]` in lang files).
- **Localization** — `en_us` + `fr_fr`; strings live in asset lang JSON for easy edits.

---

## Configuration

- **In-game:** Solea **gamerules** toggle major systems (e.g. teams, combat-log). **`/solea`** handles prefix, reload, and debug-style utilities depending on your build.
- **Files:** Config and lang files are plain text. After manual edits, run **`/solea reload`** or restart the server so changes apply cleanly.
- **Prefix:** Stored in runtime data—edit lang files for **wording**, use **`/solea prefix`** for the visible bracket text globally.
